gigapan.name: La Llorona
gigapan.description: In 2011 there was The Pier, and in 2012 that crew decided that the way to make the pier even more interesting would be to crash a Spanish Galleon right into the end of the pier. So they did, and it was amazing. Here it is shown on Tuesday after the burn, being dismantled. Here is a nice blog post on it: http://blog.burningman.com/2012/09/culture-art-music/pier-2-and-la-llorona
